# Step 01: Explore Legacy VB6 Codebase
# PrecisionParts Manufacturing System - VB6 Analysis
# Generated by GitHub Copilot CLI

## Project Overview
- **Application:** Precision Parts Manufacturing System v2.1.5
- **Company:** Precision Parts Manufacturing Inc.
- **Platform:** Visual Basic 6 SP6, Microsoft Access (.mdb) backend
- **Project File:** PrecisionParts.vbp (EXE type, single-threaded)

## Project Structure

### Forms (8)
| Form              | Description                                          |
|-------------------|------------------------------------------------------|
| frmLogin.frm      | User authentication with 3-strike lockout            |
| frmMain.frm       | MDI parent with menu bar, status bar, auto-refresh   |
| frmInventory.frm  | Raw material grid with supplier filtering, CSV export|
| frmWorkOrder.frm  | Work order entry/edit with cost calculation           |
| frmQualityCheck.frm| QC inspection (Pass/Fail/Conditional/Recheck)       |
| frmShipping.frm   | Shipping manifest with carrier selection, labels     |
| frmPartLookup.frm | Part search dialog with MSFlexGrid results           |
| frmReports.frm    | Report selection for Crystal Reports integration     |

### Modules (4)
| Module            | Description                                          |
|-------------------|------------------------------------------------------|
| modGlobals.bas    | 50+ Public globals, constants, registry config       |
| modDatabase.bas   | ADO/Jet OLEDB connection management, SQL helpers     |
| modPrinting.bas   | Crystal Reports 8.5 integration, Windows API printer |
| modUtilities.bas  | 30+ utility functions (formatting, validation, etc.) |

### Classes (3)
| Class             | Description                                          |
|-------------------|------------------------------------------------------|
| clsWorkOrder.cls  | Work order CRUD, cost calculation, status validation |
| clsInventory.cls  | Inventory tracking, reorder logic, transaction log   |
| clsPart.cls       | Part master data, part number validation             |

### Database (Access .mdb)
| Table               | Purpose                                            |
|----------------------|----------------------------------------------------|
| Users                | Authentication (plain-text passwords!)             |
| Parts                | Part master data with part numbers                 |
| RawMaterials         | Inventory tracking with reorder points             |
| Customers            | Customer contact and billing info                  |
| WorkOrders           | Manufacturing work orders with status tracking     |
| QualityChecks        | QC inspection results                              |
| ShippingManifests    | Shipping records with carrier/tracking             |
| ProductionLog        | Real-time production monitoring                    |
| MachineStatus        | Machine status tracking                            |
| ShiftSchedule        | Shift scheduling                                   |

## External Dependencies
- Microsoft ActiveX Data Objects 2.0 & 2.5 Libraries (ADO)
- Crystal Reports ActiveX Designer Runtime Library
- MSCOMCTL.OCX (Microsoft Common Controls)
- COMDLG32.OCX (Common Dialog)
- MSFLXGRD.OCX (MSFlexGrid)
- Microsoft Jet OLEDB 4.0 Provider

## Global Variables (50+)
- User context: g_CurrentUserID, g_CurrentUsername, g_CurrentUserRole, g_IsAdministrator
- UI state: g_MDIFormLoaded, g_CurrentWorkOrderID, g_GridSortColumn, g_FilterActive
- Config: g_DatabasePath, g_BackupPath, g_AutoRefreshInterval, g_EnableLogging
- Printing: g_PrinterOrientation, g_PrinterCopies, g_PrintPreviewEnabled
- Caches: g_PartsList, g_CustomersList, g_UsersList, g_MaterialsList (Collections)

## User Roles
1. Administrator - Full access
2. Manager - Most features
3. Operator - Work orders, production
4. Quality Control - QC inspections
5. Shipping - Shipping manifests

## Key Anti-Patterns Identified
1. 50+ global Public variables (tight coupling)
2. On Error GoTo / On Error Resume Next (fragile error handling)
3. Plain-text password storage in Access database
4. Windows Registry for application configuration
5. Hardcoded connection strings and file paths
6. String-concatenated SQL without parameterization (SQL injection risk)
7. DoEvents for UI responsiveness (blocking UI pattern)
8. Mixed business logic + data access in classes
9. MSFlexGrid with manual bubble sort
10. Crystal Reports 8.5 dependency (end-of-life)
11. Hardcoded labor rate ($45/hr) and overhead (15%) in business logic
12. Single-threaded execution model
